result.stdout:
dotnet task - Shortcuts for CLI commands

Usage:
  dotnet task new-manifest      - Create a new manifest in the current location
  dotnet task list              - List all tasks found in the current manifest
  dotnet task add <name> <cmd>  - Add a new task called <name> that will invoke one or more given commands
  dotnet task remove <name>     - Remove the task called <name>
  dotnet task <name>            - Invoke the task called <name> from the current manifest
  dotnet task [-h|--help]       - Print this help text
  dotnet task [-v|--version]    - Print version information

Task manifest:
  The manifest is assumed to be found at .config/dotnet-tasks.json.
  If no matching file is found, the parent directory and its parents in turn will be searched until such a file is found.
